justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted "after-tomorrow at 10h" as Wednesday, June 3rd at 10:00 AM, and all subsequent temporal requests were accurately understood.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent consistently offered alternative slots when the user's preferred times were unavailable, though it sometimes repeated previously offered options.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent generally maintained efficiency by not asking for repeated information, but it did re-list all available slots multiple times, even when the user had rejected some.
justifications.customer_experience: The customer experience was somewhat frustrating due to the repeated unavailability and the agent's tendency to re-list all options, leading to the user expressing exasperation.
justifications.recovery_quality: The agent recovered well from rejections by searching for new availabilities and maintaining context, although it did re-present previously rejected options at times.
